svg.title: Azure Front Door traffic flow diagram
svg.desc: Shows how user requests flow through Azure Front Door edge nodes to backend origins across regions

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user request reach Azure Front Door?')

sendPrompt('What happens inside Azure Front Door?')
g.text: Global edge (150+ PoPs) · WAF · SSL · Cache · Routing
Anycast DNS · Health probes · Load balancing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is an origin group in Azure Front Door?')
sendPrompt('What is an origin group in Azure Front Door?')
sendPrompt('What is an origin group in Azure Front Door?')

svg.text: If SE Asia backend is unhealthy → Front Door automatically fails over
to East US or W. Europe via health probe detection (every 30s)
WAF layer: blocks SQL injection, XSS, DDoS, bad bots
before request even reaches your backend
